content.claim: A 2026 expert debate cited by Válasz Online estimates elite gimnázium training affects approximately 200 schools and 22,000–25,000 children total, representing roughly 5–7% of secondary school enrollment.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: The basis for these enrollment figures (census year, data source) is not specified
The estimate does not account for indirect effects of early-selection tracks on ordinary school composition or motivation
Defenders and critics cite the same figure but draw opposite conclusions about policy significance
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
